name: Results — Functional Patterns Brisbane | Case Studies & Testimonials
description: Real results from Functional Patterns Brisbane. 130+ five-star reviews. Measurable pain reduction, scoliosis correction, and athlete performance gains.

name: Client Transformation Case Studies
description: Documented before-and-after transformations from clients at Functional Patterns Brisbane.

itemListElement.name: Irenie — Posture Correction
itemListElement.description: Poor posture and constant back and knee pain transformed into enhanced posture and significantly improved quality of life.

itemListElement.name: Matt — 8-Month Transformation
itemListElement.description: Kyphosis, lordosis, and chronic pain from head to toe. Now completely pain-free with reduced body fat and improved structure.

itemListElement.name: Natalie — Scoliosis & Posture
itemListElement.description: 13 months of training. Pain went from 8/10 to 0/10. Can now sleep on her side and is significantly stronger.

itemListElement.name: Louis — 3-Year Transformation
itemListElement.description: Adrenal fatigue, shoulder tears, and SI joint dysfunction. Gained 6kg of muscle with complete pain elimination.

itemListElement.name: Melissa — Scoliosis Correction
itemListElement.description: 5 months of training produced measurable curve improvement, better balance, and enhanced cognitive function.

itemListElement.name: Courtney — Post-Surgery Scoliosis
itemListElement.description: 6 months. Original 50° curve fused to 7°, then developed a new 40° curve that is now improving without further surgery.

itemListElement.name: Scoliosis — Return to Boxing
itemListElement.description: 10 months of training. Cobb angle reduced from 27° to 17°. Pain dropped from 7/10 to 0/10. Full return to competitive boxing.

itemListElement.name: Lachlan — L5/S1 & Sciatica
itemListElement.description: Severe back pain and sciatica resolved. Now pain-free with a decompressed lumbar spine.

itemListElement.name: Eleni — Post-Surgery Pain
itemListElement.description: Lower back and hip pain following surgery. Now pain-free with full daily function restored.
